citations.narrative:
In the food shed, there was evidence of rodent droppings and bags of food that had been chewed open. Evidence of
pests in food and food storage areas can result in contamination of food and impact the welfare of the animals. Supplies
of food and bedding shall be stored in facilities that adequately protect such supplies against contamination by vermin.
Correct by 3 April, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the President.

narrative:
3.1(e) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
In the food shed, there was evidence of rodent droppings and bags of food that had been chewed open. Evidence of 
pests in food and food storage areas can result in contamination of food and impact the welfare of the animals. Supplies 
of food and bedding shall be stored in facilities that adequately protect such supplies against contamination by vermin. 
 
Correct by 3 April, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the President. 
 
 n
